scripts.clean:reports: node -e "fs.rmSync('.reports', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('.reports', { recursive: true });"
scripts.deploy:workers: pnpm run deploy:www && pnpm run deploy:app && pnpm run deploy:esm
scripts.deploy:workers:staging: pnpm --filter unpkg-www run deploy:staging && pnpm --filter unpkg-app run deploy:staging && pnpm --filter unpkg-esm run deploy:staging
